name: Obelisk of Permafrost
uniques: Comment [The Obelisk draws power from the frost, granting +1 of each yield per threshold reached — each yield awakens at a different rate.]
[+1 Faith, +1 Food] <for every [3] [[Snow] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+1 Gold] <for every [5] [[Snow] Tiles][in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+1 Culture, +1 Production] <for every [8] [[Snow] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+1 Science, +1 Happiness] <for every [10] [[Snow] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+5 Faith, +3 Culture, +2 Science] <for every [1] [[Frozen Monolith] Buildings]>
Never destroyed when the city is captured
Indicates the capital city
Unsellable <hidden from users>
Unbuildable <hidden from users>
[+1 Faith, +1 Food] <for every [3] [[Desert] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+1 Gold] <for every [5] [[Desert] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+1 Culture, +1 Production] <for every [8] [[Desert] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
[+1 Science, +1 Happiness] <for every [10] [[Desert] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
Consumes [-5] [Everfrost Crystals] <for every [1] [[Snow] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
Consumes [-1] [Fungus] <for every [1] [[Desert] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
Consumes [-5] [Biomass] <for every [1] [[Desert] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities]
Consumes [-5] [Fungus] <upon turn start>
Consumes [-10] [Everfrost Crystals] <upon turn start>

civilopediaText.text: An ancient spire that hums with frozen energy, the Obelisk of Permafrost empowers the Frostborne as their dominion of ice expands.

name: Frozen Monolith
uniques: Comment [The Frozen Monolith empowers the Obelisk of Permafrost, but hinders this city unless the Eternal Freeze is used]
[+1 Faith, +1 Production] <for every [3] [[Snow] Tiles] [in all cities]> [in all cities] <when number of [[Eternal Freeze] Units] is less than [1]>
Removes extra unhappiness from annexed cities
Unsellable <hidden from users>
Never destroyed when the city is captured
Only available <in [non-[Capital]] cities> <hidden from users>

civilopediaText.text: Formed through the power of the Obelisk of Permafrost, these lesser monoliths anchor the spreading ice, amplifying the Frostborne’s dominion with each frozen stone raised.
